candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; appears as the primary revenue line in some years.
Revenue-related line but gross and not the best single reported top-line when cleaner revenue labels exist.
Clear total top-line revenue line and suitable fallback if Revenue is missing in some years.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

variables.notes: Use as priority list, not a sum. 'Revenue' is preferred; 'Total Revenue' is fallback across years.

candidates.why: Best direct production input cost line available; closest match to cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: Selected the direct production/service cost component available on the income statement.

candidates.why: Operating overhead/personnel cost and appropriate SG&A component.
Broad operating overhead bucket; suitable SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A row is present, so selected the best overhead buckets. Excluded depreciation and COGS-related lines.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost total, but less preferred than granular recurring interest components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Direct interest expense line; strong match for recurring borrowing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest cost; should be included in financing costs.
Capitalized interest is generally excluded from current-period expense.
Could reflect financing cost, but appears mostly absent and less clearly recurring interest.
Likely recurring other finance expense; acceptable component when using granular finance-cost rows.

candidates.row_label: Derivatives on interest rates - Hedging - Gain/Loss
candidates.why: Valuation/hedging gain-loss, not recurring interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Duplicate supplemental disclosure of lease-interest already reported above; avoid double counting.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost components over the broader 'Financial expenses' total. Excluded derivatives/hedging items, capitalized interest, and supplemental duplicate disclosure.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.

Entire balance sheet total, not equity.
